# RE8CH Footer Trust Mark Assets

These compact marks support the CDN footer component. They are identification
assets for trust-link context, not endorsements. Prefer official source assets
when they are stable and appropriate; otherwise keep neutral fallbacks and rely
on the outbound public-record links for verification.

## Sources and Replacement Notes

- `montana-sos.webp` - official Montana State Seal visual downloaded from the Montana Secretary of State state-seal page for compact public-record context.
- `montana-sos.svg` - local fallback mark inspired by official Montana Secretary of State and Montana State Seal references:
  - https://sosmt.gov/
  - https://sosmt.gov/state-seal/
- `duns.svg` - fallback D&B / D-U-N-S text mark. Prefer replacing with an approved D&B/DUNS Registered seal when available:
  - https://www.dnb.com/en-us/about/brand.html
  - https://dunsregistered.com/Product.aspx
- `miit-favicon.ico` - MIIT official site favicon used as a small ICP/MIIT visual cue.
- `icp.svg` - neutral ICP certificate fallback. Prefer official MIIT link text over copying unstable government artwork:
  - https://www.miit.gov.cn
  - https://beian.miit.gov.cn
- `china-credit.svg` - neutral China Credit / public registry fallback:
  - https://www.gsxt.gov.cn/index.html
- `linkedin.svg` - local LinkedIn-style fallback. Prefer official LinkedIn downloads:
  - https://brand.linkedin.com/downloads
- `crunchbase.svg` - local Crunchbase-style fallback. Prefer official Brandfolder asset:
  - https://brandfolder.com/crunchbase
- `angellist.svg` - local AngelList-style fallback. Prefer official logo source:
  - https://venture.angellist.com/v/legal/logo
- `yc-cofounder.svg` - local YC square fallback for the YC Co-Founder Matching link:
  - https://www.ycombinator.com/cofounder-matching
- `coffeespace.png` - CoffeeSpace official site shortcut icon from the public Webflow site:
  - https://www.coffeespace.com/
